datasets.name: ds_dq_domain_counts
queryLines: SELECT domain, bronze_count, silver_count,   bronze_count - silver_count AS dropped_count,   ROUND(silver_count * 100.0 / NULLIF(bronze_count, 0), 2) AS pass_rate_pct,   ROUND((bronze_count - silver_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(bronze_count, 0), 2) AS drop_rate_pct FROM (   SELECT 'Members' AS domain, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.bronze_members) AS bronze_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.silver_members) AS silver_count   UNION ALL SELECT 'Enrollment', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.bronze_enrollment), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.silver_enrollment)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Claims Medical', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.bronze_claims_medical), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.silver_claims_medical)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Claims Pharmacy', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.bronze_claims_pharmacy), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.silver_claims_pharmacy)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Encounters', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_encounters), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_encounters)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Lab Results', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_lab_results), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_lab_results)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Vitals', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_vitals), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_vitals)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Providers', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.providers.bronze_providers), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.providers.silver_providers)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Underwriting', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.underwriting.bronze_underwriting), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.underwriting.silver_underwriting)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Risk Adj Member', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.bronze_risk_adjustment_member), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.silver_risk_adjustment_member)   UNION ALL SELECT 'Risk Adj Provider', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.bronze_risk_adjustment_provider), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.silver_risk_adjustment_provider) )

datasets.name: ds_dq_totals
queryLines: SELECT SUM(bronze_count) AS total_ingested, SUM(silver_count) AS total_passed,   SUM(bronze_count) - SUM(silver_count) AS total_dropped,   ROUND(SUM(silver_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(bronze_count), 0), 2) AS overall_pass_rate,   ROUND((SUM(bronze_count) - SUM(silver_count)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(bronze_count), 0), 2) AS overall_drop_rate FROM (   SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.bronze_members) AS bronze_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.silver_members) AS silver_count   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.bronze_enrollment), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.silver_enrollment)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.bronze_claims_medical), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.silver_claims_medical)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.bronze_claims_pharmacy), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.silver_claims_pharmacy)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_encounters), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_encounters)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_lab_results), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_lab_results)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.bronze_vitals), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.clinical.silver_vitals)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.providers.bronze_providers), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.providers.silver_providers)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.underwriting.bronze_underwriting), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.underwriting.silver_underwriting)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.bronze_risk_adjustment_member), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.silver_risk_adjustment_member)   UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.bronze_risk_adjustment_provider), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.risk_adjustment.silver_risk_adjustment_provider) )

datasets.name: ds_dq_claims_detail
datasets.displayName: Claims DQ by Type and Status
queryLines: SELECT claim_type, claim_status,   SUM(total_claims) AS total_claims,   ROUND(AVG(denial_rate) * 100, 2) AS avg_denial_rate_pct FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.gold_claims_summary GROUP BY claim_type, claim_status

datasets.name: ds_claims_trend
queryLines: SELECT claim_type, service_year_month,   SUM(total_claims) AS total_claims,   SUM(total_paid) AS total_paid,   ROUND(AVG(denial_rate) * 100, 2) AS denial_rate_pct FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.gold_claims_summary WHERE service_year_month >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY claim_type, service_year_month ORDER BY service_year_month

datasets.name: ds_pmpm_trend
queryLines: SELECT line_of_business, service_year_month,   ROUND(pmpm_paid, 2) AS pmpm_paid,   ROUND(pmpm_allowed, 2) AS pmpm_allowed,   member_months FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_pmpm WHERE service_year_month >= '2023-01-01' ORDER BY service_year_month

datasets.name: ds_enrollment
queryLines: SELECT line_of_business, plan_type,   active_member_count, total_member_count,   ROUND(avg_premium, 2) AS avg_premium,   ROUND(avg_risk_score, 3) AS avg_actuarial_risk_score,   ROUND(churn_rate_pct, 2) AS churn_rate_pct FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.gold_enrollment_summary

datasets.name: ds_denial_by_category
queryLines: SELECT denial_category,   SUM(denial_count) AS denial_count,   ROUND(SUM(total_denied_amount), 2) AS total_denied_amount,   ROUND(AVG(avg_denied_amount), 2) AS avg_denied_amount FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_denial_analysis GROUP BY denial_category

datasets.name: ds_denial_by_lob
queryLines: SELECT denial_category, line_of_business,   SUM(denial_count) AS denial_count,   ROUND(SUM(total_denied_amount), 2) AS total_denied_amount FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_denial_analysis GROUP BY denial_category, line_of_business

datasets.name: ds_exec_kpis
queryLines: SELECT   (SELECT SUM(active_member_count) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.gold_enrollment_summary) AS total_active_members,   (SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_paid), 2) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.gold_claims_summary) AS total_claims_paid,   (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT claim_type) FROM `clinical-data-demo`.claims.gold_claims_summary) AS claim_types

datasets.name: ds_mlr
queryLines: SELECT line_of_business,   ROUND(SUM(total_claims_paid) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(total_premiums), 0), 1) AS mlr_pct,   ROUND(MAX(CAST(target_mlr AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 0) AS target_mlr_pct FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_mlr WHERE mlr IS NOT NULL AND total_premiums IS NOT NULL AND total_premiums > 0 GROUP BY line_of_business

datasets.name: ds_risk_adjustment
queryLines: SELECT line_of_business, model_year, member_count,   ROUND(avg_raf_score, 3) AS avg_raf_score,   ROUND(pct_high_risk * 100, 2) AS pct_high_risk,   ROUND(estimated_annual_revenue, 2) AS estimated_annual_revenue FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_risk_adjustment_analysis

datasets.name: ds_member_demographics
queryLines: SELECT line_of_business, age_band,   SUM(member_count) AS member_count FROM `clinical-data-demo`.members.gold_member_demographics GROUP BY line_of_business, age_band

datasets.name: ds_ai_risk_narratives
queryLines: SELECT member_id, ROUND(raf_score, 2) AS raf_score,   hcc_codes, hcc_count, line_of_business, risk_rank,   risk_category, clinical_summary FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_member_risk_narrative WHERE risk_rank <= 20 ORDER BY risk_rank

datasets.name: ds_stars_provider
queryLines: SELECT s.star_rating, s.star_label, COALESCE(g.provider_count, 0) AS provider_count, s.star_color FROM (   SELECT 1 AS star_rating, '1 Star' AS star_label, '#D32F2F' AS star_color   UNION ALL SELECT 2, '2 Stars', '#F57C00'   UNION ALL SELECT 3, '3 Stars', '#FBC02D'   UNION ALL SELECT 4, '4 Stars', '#7CB342'   UNION ALL SELECT 5, '5 Stars', '#2E7D32' ) s LEFT JOIN (   SELECT star_rating, COUNT(*) AS provider_count   FROM `clinical-data-demo`.analytics.gold_stars_provider   GROUP BY star_rating ) g ON s.star_rating = g.star_rating ORDER BY s.star_rating
